mapper.select: SELECT id, product_code, product_name, product_type, risk_level, issuer, expected_return_rate, min_investment, max_investment, investment_period, start_date, end_date, product_status, description, features, purchase_rule, redemption_rule, fee_rate, management_fee, total_scale, remaining_scale, sort_order, cover_image, detail_images, created_by, created_at, FROM wealth_management_product WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
